caption: A man with a tall, stylized grey wig, glasses, and headphones sits in a room filled with framed photographs and clothing displays. He is wearing a white button-down shirt, a red bowtie, and tan suspenders. He is positioned behind a professional microphone. On-screen graphics appear on both sides of him; the left side features a logo with the text "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" and the right side features red text that reads "BOSS TALK JOY". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, but his head movement shifts slightly. In the initial moments, he looks forward with a neutral expression, then tilts his head downward and looks slightly to the side, before returning to a forward-facing position with a subtle change in facial expression. The background remains static, showing a variety of portraits and merchandise.
